name: Baked Vidalia Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut each onion into 8 wedges, stopping at the root end so the pieces stay together.
2. Divide the butter into 4 pat-sized portions and place one pat on top of each onion piece.
3. Wrap each onion securely in foil to enclose all ingredients.
4. Sprinkle the garlic breadcrumbs and salt, to taste, along with plenty of freshly ground pepper over each wrapped onion.
5. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes or until the onions are tender.
Randy Rigg Food Exchange per serving: 1 VEGETABLES EXCHANGE + 1 FAT EXCHANGE
(The fat exchange could be reduced further)
